raw_consumer_statement: My identity was taken over by an unauthorized user on XXXX XXXX. I was in XXXX XXXX on vacation at the time. The unauthorized user done a XXXX swap on my phone and hacked my banking. Credit cards, email and. Cell phone. I froze my credit with credit bureau and notify my card companies of fraud and identity take over I filed a claim with identity theft. Barleys bank is the only company that is disputing my identity take over and will not accept the charges on my account on XX/XX/XXXX a total of XXXX in total. I did not make these charges and will not be responsible to pay for charges that I didnt make. I want them to investigate the charges and see there is no way it was me. I can prove I was out of the country by airline tickets and passport stamps. Hotel reservations. I want Barklys bank to retract these fraudulent charges
